name: HRC_ALERT_RUN_RECIPIENTS_DATA
description: Stores recipients data for a run.

columns.Name: RUN_RECIPIENT_DATA_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column

columns.Name: RECIPIENT_SEQ
columns.Comments: Used no of recipients evaluated for recipient expression

columns.Name: RUN_ID
columns.Comments: Run Identifier. Foreign Key to HRC_ALERTS_RUNS.RUN_ID

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Template Identifier. Foreign Key to HRC_ALERT_TEMPLATES.TEMPLATE_ID

columns.Name: RECIPIENT_ID
columns.Comments: Recipient Identifier. Foreign Key to HRC_ALERT_RECIPIENTS.RECIPENT_ID

columns.Name: RECIPIENT_EXPR_VAL
columns.Comments: Recipient Expression value

columns.Name: RECIPIENT_LANG_PREF
columns.Comments: Recipient Preference Language

columns.Name: GROUP_BY_EXPR_VAL
columns.Comments: Recipient Group By Expression value

columns.Name: BASE_LANG_FILTER_DATA_ID
columns.Comments: Node Identifier. Foreign Key to HRC_ALERT_RUN_FILTERS_DATA.FILTER_DATA_ID

columns.Name: RUN_MESSAGE_DATA_ID
columns.Comments: Message Identifier. Foreign Key to HRC_ALERT_RUN_MESSAGES.MESSAGE_ID

columns.Name: REPLICATE_STATUS
columns.Comments: Replicate Status Possible values are B (Base Recipient),R - Replicated Recipient

columns.Name: EXT_MSG_TYPE
columns.Comments: Specifies external Message Type. possible values ORA_WL, ORA_EM

columns.Name: EXT_MSG_ID
columns.Comments: Specifies external Message Identifier. Foreign Key to BPELNOTIFICATION.WFTASKID OR MESSAGE.MESSAGEID

columns.Name: HASH_KEY
columns.Comments: Feed recipient and body hash key.

columns.Name: HASH_KEY_VERSION
columns.Comments: Feed recipient and body hash key version.

columns.Name: OBJ_HASH_KEY
columns.Comments: Object hash key which holds surrogates key hash.

columns.Name: OBJ_HASH_KEY_VERSION
columns.Comments: Object hash key which holds surrogates key hash version.

columns.Name: CHUNK_NUM
columns.Comments: Chunk Number

columns.Name: CHUNK_STATUS
columns.Comments: Chunk Status , Possible values : NEW, IN-PROCESS, SUCCESS, ERROR

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
